title: Last Tuesday Of Chaitra, Mahavir Jayanti… What Triggered Nalanda Temple Stampede That Killed 8 Women?
description: 8 women were killed and several injured in a stampede at Sheetla Temple in Bihar’s Nalanda during a religious gathering. Overcrowding triggered chaos as devotees surged. The Bihar Government has announced an ex gratia of Rs 6 lakh and the PMO Rs 2 lakh each for the families of those killed.
